overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic city sidewalk past commercial buildings and construction barriers, then stopping by a parked car to shoot at passing traffic. The scene features bright midday lighting, neon signage, and dense urban architecture with elevated highways.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past a Wash n Run shop, following two pedestrians ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red vest walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: corner store with neon signage and blue chairs outside
tall red and black construction barriers lining the sidewalk
futuristic curved blue street light poles along the road
yellow elevated highway structure in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit commercial sidewalk next to a Wash n Run shop. Red construction barriers line the left side while futuristic blue street lights stand along the multi-lane road to the right. Sparse pedestrians walk ahead in the same direction, and an elevated highway ramp is visible in the distance.

events.description: large red advertising billboards become visible on the construction wall

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk past large red billboards on the construction wall

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt walking toward camera along the wall

entered.detail: large advertisement showing a figure on red background mounted on construction wall

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a long red construction wall featuring large advertising billboards. Pedestrians walk in both directions along the narrow sidewalk, and the density of people increases slightly. The Wash n Run shop disappears behind as the character moves deeper into the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: street side parking near Delamain storefront

events.description: character crosses from sidewalk to street side and stops next to a parked blue car

agents.ego_description: crossing from the sidewalk to the street side and stopping next to a parked vehicle

notable_agents.action: various cars driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: building with Delamain signage and teal accents, corporate facade
small teal-colored compact car parked on the street side
metal railing separating sidewalk from the road

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the Delamain storefront and crosses from the sidewalk to the street side, stopping next to a parked blue compact car. The construction wall ends, revealing more of the street and passing traffic. The character stands by the car observing the road.

events.description: character draws a pistol and fires at a passing yellow car, causing it to crash

agents.ego_description: standing by the parked car, drawing a weapon and firing at passing traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow car driving on the road that gets shot and crashes

segments.scene_description: The character stands stationary by the blue car, pulls out a handgun, and fires at a passing yellow vehicle. The targeted car crashes with visible smoke. The camera remains focused on the road and the crashed vehicle as traffic continues to pass by.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a bustling futuristic sidewalk that transitions from a commercial walk into a sudden act of street violence. It begins with the character walking past a Wash n Run shop beside red construction barriers and blue street lights, with an elevated highway ramp looming in the distance. As the character moves deeper into the commercial district, the shop fades away and the sidewalk becomes more crowded with pedestrians passing by large advertising billboards. The scene then opens up as the construction wall ends, leading the character to step off the pavement and stop beside a parked blue compact car near a Delamain storefront. Finally, the camera remains stationary as the character draws a handgun and fires at a passing yellow vehicle, causing it to crash in a cloud of smoke amidst the flowing traffic.
